nav.subtitle: Digital ecosystem, publishing, and web support

footer.copy: A presentation hub for your sub-projects, a commercial storefront, a client entry point, and a foundation ready for future hosting and advanced administration services.

hero.title: The editorial and commercial hub for all your digital projects.
hero.lead: Akasha Production showcases, structures, and sells your full ecosystem of sub-projects. The site is designed as a clear entry point: identity, offers, ordering, contact, client follow-up, and future hosting management expansion.

stats.label: sub-projects already designed as editorial extensions

about.title: We build our own creations and support professional web projects over the long term.
about.copyOne: Akasha Production designs, builds, and evolves its own websites. That direct experience shapes a practical approach focused on structure, identity, commercial clarity, and technical durability.
about.copyTwo: Throughout our experience, we have also developed several professional websites for companies across different sectors. This allows us to deliver coherent, solid, and genuinely useful web creations.

projects.title: A selection of projects and live digital universes
projects.lead: Here are some of our projects and working bases. When a preview is unavailable, the card stays in place with a “Coming soon” state.

ecosystem.title: One parent brand for multiple universes
ecosystem.copy: Each sub-project keeps its own identity while fitting into a coherent structure of domains, subdomains, and commercial pages.

commerce.title: Simple offers, clear packs, structured quotes
commerce.copy: The catalog supports standalone purchases, creation + hosting combinations, and quote requests backed by a consistent needs questionnaire.

hosting.title: A foundation ready for an advanced client area
hosting.copy: The customer account already reserves room for future modules: FTP, SSH, phpMyAdmin, PostgreSQL, technical tracking, and hosted services.

experience.title: Internal creations and professional projects
experience.copy: We build our own platforms and have developed several professional websites for various businesses throughout our experience.

solutions.title: Structured, combinable, and scalable offers.
solutions.lead: Products can be purchased on their own, combined together, or turned into a quote request depending on the level of customization needed.

showcase.name: Showcase website
showcase.headline: Multilingual 3-page website
showcase.description: A polished web presence launched quickly.

points.three: Perfect integration into the Akasha Production ecosystem

complex.name: Complex website
complex.headline: 9-page website + commerce, newsletter, blog + database
complex.description: For richer and more autonomous digital projects.

custom.name: Custom creation
custom.headline: Tailor-made project
custom.description: In-depth scoping and a dedicated roadmap.

subdomain.name: Free subdomain
subdomain.description: Akasha or thematic parent subdomain, subject to validation.

custom.name: Custom domain name
custom.description: Addition or management of a dedicated yearly domain.

third.title: Custom pack
third.copy: Tailor-made creation and hosting after review.

contact.title: Describe your needs, constraints, and supporting files.
contact.lead: The contact form saves the full contact profile, handles a project-specific mode, and accepts DOCX, PDF, JPG, and WEBP files.

order.title: Build your offer, your options, and your payment mode.
order.lead: The ordering flow supports simple purchases, promotional packs, and a free virtual quote request. Every useful choice is saved with the order.

form.title: Order and quote
form.description: Select a creation tier, hosting plan, domain mode, and options. Promotional combinations are recalculated automatically.
form.stripeMissing: If Stripe is not configured yet, the order is still stored locally as a fully usable request.

account.title: Customer tracking, orders, and subscriptions.
account.lead: This area displays purchases and prepares the path toward a complete technical panel for hosted services.

future.two: Detailed view of the purchased offer and attached options
future.three: Area under construction for FTP, SSH, phpMyAdmin, and PostgreSQL
